nasb.text: “Speak to all the congregation of the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘You shall be holy, for I the Lord your God am holy.

esv.text: “Speak to all the congregation of the people of Israel and say to them, You shall be holy, for I the Lord your God am holy.

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列全體會眾，對他們說：你們要分別為聖，因為我耶和華你們的　神是聖潔的。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列全体会众。 “你们要圣洁，因为我——你们的上帝耶和华是圣洁的。
